rows.reference: Ẹ jọ̀ọ́, gbígbé owó mi kùnà lórí OPay. Owó mi sì ti sọnù.
rows.output: Ẹ jẹ gbigbe ọwọ mi kún lórí OPay, ọwọ mi si ti sọnu.

rows.reference: Mo gbé owó láti PalmPay sí Access Bank, ṣùgbọ́n ó kùnà. Owó mi sì ti lọ.
rows.output: Mo gbé ọwọ láti PalmPay sí Access Bank, ṣùgbọ́n ó kún ná, ọwọ mi si ti lọ.

rows.reference: Owó mi ti sọnù lórí Moniepoint, lẹ́yìn gbígbé owó tó kùnà.
rows.output: Ọwọ mi ti sọnu lórí Moniepoint lẹ́yìn gbigbe owó tó kún ná.

rows.reference: PalmPay mi ti dínà nítorí KYC. Mi ò lè gbé owó jáde.
rows.output: PalmPay mi ti dínà nítorí KYC, mi ò le gbé owó jáde.

rows.reference: Mo ṣì owó firánṣẹ́ sí akọó̀lẹ́ mìíràn lórí OPay.
rows.output: Mo si ọwọ fún rẹ si akọwálẹ́ míràn lórí OPay.

rows.reference: Níbo ni mo ti lè rí Session ID, fún gbígbé owó tó kùnà?
rows.output: Nibo ni mo ti le ri session ID fun gbigbe owo to kuna?

rows.reference: Báwo ni mo ṣe lè sọ BVN àti NIN mi pọ̀ mọ́ OPay, láti gbé owó sókè?
rows.output: Bawo ni mo se le so BVN ati NIN mi po mo OPay lati gbe owo soke?

rows.reference: Account mi ti dínà, nítorí wọ́n rí ìwà ìfura lórí rẹ̀.
rows.output: Account mi ti di nitori won ri iwa ifura lori re.

rows.reference: Wọ́n nà mí ní owó lẹ́mẹjì, fún ríra ẹyọ kan.
rows.output: O na mi ni owo le meji fun rira eyokan.

rows.reference: Ó ti tó wákàtí méjì-lé-lọ́gọ́jọ, tí mo ti ń dúró de reversal mi.
rows.output: O ti to wakati meji le logojo ti mo ti n duro de reversal mi.

rows.reference: Mo fẹ́ rí transaction history mi, láti oṣù tó kọjá.
rows.output: Mo fe ri transaction history mi lati osu to koja.

rows.reference: App OPay mi ń crash, nígbà tí mo bá fẹ́ gbé owó.
rows.output: App payment crash nigba ti mo ba fe gbe owo.

rows.reference: Debit card mi ò ṣiṣẹ́ lórí ATM. Mo fẹ́ mọ ìdí tí ó fi rí bẹ́ẹ̀.
rows.output: Debit card mi o sise lori ATM, mo fe mo idi ti o fi ri be.

rows.reference: Mo rí debit tí mi ò mọ̀ nípa rẹ̀, lórí account mi.
rows.output: Mo ri debit ti mi o mo nipa re lori account mi.

rows.reference: Wọ́n ní mo ti dé daily transfer limit mi, ṣùgbọ́n mo nílò láti gbé owó pàjáwìrì.
rows.output: Won ni mo ti de daily transfer limit mi, sugbon mo nilo lati gbe owo pajawiri.

rows.reference: Báwo ni mo ṣe lè ṣe àtúnṣe, sí BVN mi tí ó wà lórí PalmPay?
rows.output: Bawo ni mo se le se atunse si BVN mi ti o wa lori PalmPay?

rows.reference: Koodu USSD wo ni mo lè lo, láti wo balance mi lórí OPay?
rows.output: Kodu USSD wo ni mo le lo lati wo balance mi lori OPay?

rows.reference: Orúkọ tí ó hàn nígbà tí mo fẹ́ gbé owó, yàtọ̀ sí orúkọ tó yẹ kó hàn.
rows.output: Oruko ti o han nigba ti mo fe gbe owo yato si oruko to ye ko han.

rows.reference: Ẹ jọ̀ọ́, ẹ ràn mí lọ́wọ́! Wọn ti ṣe scam mi lórí OPay, wọ́n sì gbé gbogbo owó mi lọ.
rows.output: Ejo, e ran mi lowo, won ti se scam mi lori OPay, won si gbe gbogbo owo mi lo.

rows.reference: Báwo ni mo ṣe lè bá customer care gidi sọ̀rọ̀, yàtọ̀ sí bot yìí?
rows.output: Bawo ni mo se le ba customer care gidi soro yato si bot yii?

rows.reference: Please my transfer failed on OPay and my money has been debited.
rows.output: I have successfully transferred the money to the OPay account, but the money has not been received.

rows.reference: I transferred money from PalmPay to Access Bank but it failed and my money was debited.
rows.output: I transferred money from PalmPay to Access Bank, but it was not successful and the money did not go through.

rows.reference: My money is lost on Moniepoint after a failed transfer.
rows.output: My money was not received on Moniepoint after the transfer was successful.

rows.reference: My PalmPay is restricted because of KYC, I cannot withdraw money.
rows.output: My PalmPay account has been restricted due to KYC, so I cannot withdraw money.

rows.reference: I mistakenly sent money to another account on OPay.
rows.output: I have successfully transferred the money to the account, but it has not been received.

rows.reference: Where can I find the Session ID for my failed transfer?
rows.output: How can I get a Session ID to track my money?

rows.reference: How do I link my BVN and NIN to OPay to increase my limit?
rows.output: How can I use my BVN and NIN to withdraw money?

rows.reference: My account has been blocked because they saw suspicious activity on it.
rows.output: My account is blocked because they see suspicious activity on it.

rows.reference: I was debited twice for a single purchase.
rows.output: I need 50,000 Naira to pay for my daily needs.

rows.reference: It has been 48 hours that I have been waiting for my reversal.
rows.output: It has been two days since I initiated the reversal.

rows.reference: I want to see my transaction history from last month.
rows.output: I want to see my transaction history from last month.

rows.reference: My OPay app crashes when I want to transfer money.
rows.output: The app keeps crashing when I try to withdraw money.

rows.reference: My debit card is not working on the ATM, I want to know why.
rows.output: My debit card is not working at the ATM, I want to know the reason.

rows.reference: I saw a debit that I do not know about on my account.
rows.output: I see a debit on my account that I don't recognize.

rows.reference: They said I reached my daily transfer limit but I need to make an emergency transfer.
rows.output: I have reached my daily transfer limit, but I need to send more money.

rows.reference: How can I correct my BVN that is on PalmPay?
rows.output: How can I link my BVN to my PalmPay account?

rows.reference: What USSD code can I use to check my balance on OPay?
rows.output: Which USSD code can I use to check my OPay balance?

rows.reference: The name that appeared when I wanted to transfer money is different from the name that should appear.
rows.output: The name I see when I want to transfer money is different from the name it should be.

rows.reference: Please help me, I have been scammed on OPay, they took all my money.
rows.output: Please help me, I have been scammed on OPay and they have taken all my money.

rows.reference: How can I speak to a real customer care agent instead of this bot?
rows.output: How can I speak to a customer care agent instead of this bot?
